chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett.No.D-1729 of 2024 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For directions For orders on CMA No.2587/2025 (C/A) 22.10.2025 Mr. Abdul Ghaffar, Advocate along with petitioner Mr. Ali Raza Balouch, Additional Advocate General ************** It has been pointed out by the learned Additional Advocate General that the disability certificate annexed as Annexure "A" has not been issued by a duly constituted Medical Board and, therefore, does not confirm to the requirements of the Committee established in 2019 under the Sindh Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities Act, 2018. In view of the foregoing, CMA No. 2587/2025 is disposed of with a direction to the petitioner to first approach the competent authority for issuance of a proper disability certificate in accordance with the provisions of the aforementioned Act. Thereafter, the petitioner may approach the concerned District Recruitment Committee, which shall consider his case strictly in accordance with law, subject to obtaining the vacancy position from all the respondents/departments. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
